items.title_en: Samsung, SK Hynix shares fall as investors brace for reported $1.3 trillion spending plans

items.desc_en: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plunged after reports surfaced that the pair are expected to unveil investment plans worth hundreds of billions of dollars.
items.desc_zh: 有报道称三星电子和 SK 海力士预计将公布价值数千亿美元的投资计划，导致三星电子和 SK 海力士股价暴跌。

items.title_en: Oil rises as renewed U.S.-Iran strikes reignite Middle East supply fears
items.title_zh: 随着美国和伊朗的新一轮袭击重燃中东供应担忧，油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil edged higher on Monday after renewed military strikes between the U.S. and Iran reignited concerns over crude supplies from the Middle East.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗之间再次发动军事打击，重新引发对中东原油供应的担忧，周一油价小幅走高。

items.title_en: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France - BBC
items.title_zh: 载有跳伞员的飞机在法国东部坠毁，造成11人死亡 - BBC
items.desc_en: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France  BBCSkydiving plane crashes in France, killing 11 people  CNNFrench investigators probe fatal skydiving plane crash that killed p
items.desc_zh: 载有跳伞运动员的飞机在法国东部坠毁，造成 11 人死亡 BBC 法国跳伞飞机坠毁，造成 11 人死亡 CNN 法国调查人员正在调查导致一名乘客死亡的致命跳伞飞机失事

items.title_en: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织称，欧洲热浪导致 1,300 人死亡，德国气温达到创纪录的 41.7 摄氏度
items.desc_en: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.
items.desc_zh: 世卫组织总干事谭德塞警告称，欧洲尚未做好应对高温的准备。

items.title_en: Three firefighters die battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border
items.title_zh: 三名消防员在科罗拉多州和犹他州边境的巨大野火中丧生
items.desc_en: A number of blazes have been raging across Utah and Colorado, leading both governors to declare states of emergency.
items.desc_zh: 犹他州和科罗拉多州发生多起火灾，导致两国州长宣布进入紧急状态。

items.title_en: Thirty-three people rescued, thousands still missing after Venezuela quakes
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震后33人获救，数千人失踪
items.desc_en: Just under 50,000 people were listed as unaccounted for on a website promoted by the country's political opposition on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 周日，该国政治反对派宣传的一个网站上有近 5 万人被列为下落不明。

items.title_en: Fourteen killed in Saudi Arabia helicopter crash
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯直升机失事 14人死亡
items.desc_en: The aircraft belonged to state oil giant Aramco and the cause of the crash is being investigated.
items.desc_zh: 这架飞机属于国有石油巨头沙特阿美公司，坠机原因正在调查中。

items.title_en: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
items.title_zh: 美国无法获得足够的蛋白质。乳制品行业跟不上
items.desc_en: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国饮食趋势的变化和 GLP-1 的蓬勃发展，乳清蛋白的需求量激增，而乳制品行业却难以生产足够的乳清蛋白。

items.title_en: European heatwave causes 1,000 excess deaths in France - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 欧洲热浪导致法国超千人死亡 - 半岛电视台
items.desc_en: European heatwave causes 1,000 excess deaths in France  Al JazeeraRecord heatwave disrupts Europe as France warns death toll to rise  ReutersFrance records around 1,000 additional deaths as extreme he
items.desc_zh: 欧洲热浪导致法国 1,000 人超额死亡 半岛电视台记录，法国警告死亡人数将上升，热浪扰乱了欧洲 路透社法国记录了大约 1,000 人因极端天气而死亡

items.title_en: Australian man charged with murder after girl found dead in suitcase in Thailand
items.title_zh: 泰国手提箱内发现女孩尸体，澳大利亚男子被控谋杀
items.desc_en: The 17-year-old's body was found discarded near a railway track on Saturday, police say.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，周六，这名 17 岁男子的尸体被发现被丢弃在铁轨附近。

items.title_en: Aramco Helicopter Crash in Ras Tanura Kills All 14 on Board - Bloomberg.com
items.title_zh: 沙特阿美直升机在 Ras Tanura 坠毁，机上 14 人全部遇难 - Bloomberg.com
items.desc_en: Aramco Helicopter Crash in Ras Tanura Kills All 14 on Board  Bloomberg.comSaudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says  CNBCAramco helicopter crashes at Saudi port as Gulf
items.desc_zh: 沙特阿美公司直升机在拉斯坦努拉 (Ras Tanura) 坠毁，机上 14 人全部遇难 Bloomberg.com 沙特阿美公司直升机坠毁，造成 14 名国民死亡，国家通讯社称 CNBC 沙特阿美公司直升机在海湾地区沙特港口坠毁

items.title_en: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
items.title_zh: 一些租房者表示，拥有住房并不是他们美国梦的一部分：租房“对我来说真的是一种自由”
items.desc_en: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.
items.desc_zh: 一些人不再将租房视为买房道路上的暂时停止，而是一种长期的生活方式选择，反映了美国梦的转变。

items.title_en: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
items.title_zh: IRA 持有的资金比 401(k) 计划多出数万亿美元——但人们却很少在其中存钱
items.desc_en: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.
items.desc_zh: 投资者越来越多地将资金从 401(k) 计划转入 IRA。一些观察家担心他们会收到糟糕的投资建议。

items.title_en: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
items.title_zh: 如果你认为中国需要推翻美元，那你就不明白它是如何发动全球货币战争的
items.desc_en: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.
items.desc_zh: 关注人民币取代美元是错误的。北京已经成功减少了对以美元为中心的全球体系的依赖。

items.title_en: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
items.title_zh: 载有跳伞员的飞机在法国东部坠毁 11人死亡
items.desc_en: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.
items.desc_zh: 当地官员称，飞行员和 10 名乘客在事件中死亡。

items.title_en: Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says
items.title_zh: 国家通讯社称沙特阿美直升机坠毁造成 14 人死亡
items.desc_en: Aramco had resumed crude oil loadings on Friday at its Ras Tanura terminal in the Gulf after they were halted for nearly four months.
items.desc_zh: 沙特阿美公司位于海湾的 Ras Tanura 码头在暂停近四个月后于周五恢复了原油装载。

items.title_en: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
items.title_zh: 两名男孩被困几天后从委内瑞拉地震废墟中获救
items.desc_en: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.
items.desc_zh: 救援人员花了六个小时仔细挖掘才找到其中一名男孩，许多居民仍在用手在废墟中搜寻，仍在等待重型机械到达。

items.title_en: These 10 Chinese stocks are powering U.S. data centers
items.title_zh: 这10只中国股票正在为美国数据中心提供动力
items.desc_en: Many of the top-performing mainland Chinese stocks this year make components used in data centers globally, according to 22V Research.
items.desc_zh: 根据 22V Research 的数据，今年许多表现最好的中国大陆股票都生产用于全球数据中心的组件。

items.title_en: Morgan Stanley says salt is the new oil. Here's why and how to play it
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利称盐是新石油。这是为什么以及如何玩它
items.desc_en: Salt can become as sought-out as oil amid a boom in demand for sodium-ion batteries, according to the firm.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，随着钠离子电池需求的激增，盐可能会像石油一样受到追捧。

items.title_en: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
items.title_zh: 医疗保险中的老年人即将获得具有里程碑意义的肥胖药物承保——但许多人可能还不知道
items.desc_en: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.
items.desc_zh: 许多老年人可能不知道从 7 月 1 日开始的具有里程碑意义的覆盖范围转变，政府或礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 和 Novo 的广告有限。

items.title_en: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
items.title_zh: “完美风暴”表明美国汽车市场到 2040 年将大幅缩小
items.desc_en: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.
items.desc_zh: 汽车行业的汽车销量正在减少——一位预测人士表示，这是一个根本性的变化，而且情况还会变得更糟。

items.title_en: Uganda's leading media outlets shut down by army chief
items.title_zh: 乌干达主要媒体被陆军参谋长关闭
items.desc_en: NTV and Daily Monitor say their offices in the capital are under "military siege".
items.desc_zh: NTV 和 Daily Monitor 表示，他们在首都的办公室受到“军事围困”。

items.title_en: Trump again threatens Iran with annihilation as Kuwait and Bahrain report attacks
items.title_zh: 科威特和巴林报告袭击事件后，特朗普再次威胁要消灭伊朗
items.desc_en: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，在美国袭击霍尔木兹海峡及其周边目标后，伊朗将目标锁定在科威特和巴林的美国军事设施。

items.title_en: US launches strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
items.title_zh: 美国在第二次航运袭击后对伊朗发动打击
items.desc_en: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，它对美国在科威特和巴林的基础设施发动了报复性袭击。

items.title_en: 117 dead dogs found at California 'no-kill' animal rescue - many with gunshot wounds
items.title_zh: 加州“不杀生”动物救援中心发现 117 只死狗，其中许多有枪伤
items.desc_en: Hundreds more animals are still missing from the California facility as investigators continue excavating the grounds.
items.desc_zh: 随着调查人员继续挖掘场地，加州设施中仍有数百只动物失踪。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Australia to double maximum penalty for platforms in breach of social media ban
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚将对违反社交媒体禁令的平台处以双倍最高罚款
items.desc_en: Children under the age of 16 have been prevented from 10 key social media platforms in Australia since December 2025.
items.desc_zh: 自 2025 年 12 月以来，澳大利亚 10 个主要社交媒体平台已禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用。

items.title_en: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
items.title_zh: 真主党谴责新协议，以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部
items.desc_en: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩和以色列签署框架协议一天后，官方媒体称，袭击已造成至少一人死亡。

items.title_en: Budapest's first Pride since Orban left power
items.title_zh: 欧尔班下台后布达佩斯的第一次骄傲
items.desc_en: Budapest held its first Pride march since the end of former prime minister Viktor Orban's 16-year government with thousands turning out to celebrate.
items.desc_zh: 布达佩斯举行了自前总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 16 年政府结束以来的首次骄傲游行，数千人前来庆祝。

items.title_en: Heatwave breaks more records in northern and central Europe
items.title_zh: 热浪在北欧和中欧打破了更多记录
items.desc_en: Germany, Denmark and the Czech republic are among the countries recording new all-time high temperatures.
items.desc_zh: 德国、丹麦和捷克共和国是创下历史新高的国家之一。
